<var>
$DPS$ = Damage * Bullet Count / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 1125; 640; 1550; 6000; 18500
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 400; 150; 1050; 3000; 8500
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 1; ; 2
$FNC-PVP-DETECTION$ = 2; 2;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Shotgun Knowledge; Clay Pigeon Training; Heavier Shells; Tactical Blowback
$FNC-PVP-UPGRADE$ = Faster Reloading; Shotgun Knowledge; Slug Madness; Tactical Blowback
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 5587697635; 5587697884; 5587698104; 5587698246
$DREF$ = <ref name=damage>The first two enemies damaged by the same bullet are dealt full damage, while the third enemy is dealt half of the damage.</ref>
$DPREF$ = <ref name=dps>DPS assumes all bullets hit only one enemy.</ref>
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage$DREF$ !! Bullet Count !! Firerate !! Range !! Spread !! Max Hits !! DPS$DPREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 8 || 1.2 || 8 || 10 || 3 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 8 || 1.2 || 8 || 10 || 3 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 10 || 0.85 || 9.5 || 15 || 3 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 7 || 10 || 0.85 || 11 || 25 || 3 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 14 || 12 || 0.75 || 13.5 || 40 || 3 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage$DREF$ !! Bullet Count !! Firerate !! Range !! Spread !! Max Hits !! DPS$DPREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 8 || 2 || 7.5 || 45 || 3 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 8 || 1.5 || 7.5 || 45 || 3 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 10 || 1.5 || 9 || 40 || 3 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 4 || 10 || 1.25 || 9.5 || 40 || 3 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 8 || 12 || 1 || 11 || 30 || 3 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
